title: Google Maps Company Scraper
description: Scrapes company data from Google Maps.

searchQuery.title: Search Query (Optional)
searchQuery.description: Main keyword to search for. If empty, the actor builds the query from Industry Filter + Location.
searchQuery.example: IT services companies with 500+ employees in Bangalore

location.title: Location
location.description: Geographic area to focus the search on.

industryFilter.title: Industry Filter
industryFilter.description: Restrict results to a specific industry. Used both to build the search query and to filter results by category.

minEmployees.title: Minimum Employee Size
minEmployees.description: Filter out companies with fewer employees than this. Set to 0 to disable.

maxEmployees.title: Maximum Employee Size (Optional)
maxEmployees.description: Filter out companies with more employees than this. Leave empty for no upper limit.

numResults.title: Number of Results Required
numResults.description: How many companies to extract. Maximum is 500.

useProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useProxy.description: Highly recommended for large runs to avoid rate limiting.
